case_title: CHAN KWAN KAM VS. EUGENE ALONZO MARCUS et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KAM, CHAN KWAN TRUSTEE LIU FAMILY 2004 REVOCABLE TRUST RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARCUS, EUGENE ALONZO DOES 1 TO 10 THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 624 ELLIS STREET, APT. 4, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109, **INCLUDING ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES**
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT MARCUS, EUGENE ALONZO

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ALSO SERVED PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF KAM, CHAN KWAN TRUSTEE LIU FAMILY 2004 REVOCABLE TRUST SERVED NOV-18-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MARCUS, EUGENE ALONZO
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $30.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF KAM, CHAN KWAN TRUSTEE LIU FAMILY 2004 REVOCABLE TRUST
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF KAM, CHAN KWAN TRUSTEE LIU FAMILY 2004 REVOCABLE TRUST SERVED NOV-18-2011, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
DECLARATION RE LEASE AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KAM, CHAN KWAN TRUSTEE LIU FAMILY 2004 REVOCABLE TRUST
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT MARCUS, EUGENE ALONZO DOES 1 TO 10
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MARCUS, EUGENE ALONZO

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KAM, CHAN KWAN TRUSTEE LIU FAMILY 2004 REVOCABLE TRUST AS TO DEFENDANT MARCUS, EUGENE ALONZO DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
